name: wp-tailwind-starter
description: WordPress FSE Block Theme with Tailwind CSS v4 + Xserver SSH Deploy

scripts.deploy: npm run build && rsync -avz --delete -e 'ssh -p 10022 -i ~/.ssh/xserver_KEY' --exclude='.git' --exclude='.claude' --exclude='node_modules' --exclude='src' --exclude='package*.json' --exclude='DESIGN.md' --exclude='CLAUDE.md' --exclude='README.md' --exclude='setup-deploy.sh' --exclude='preview.html' ./ USER@SERVER.xserver.jp:~/DOMAIN/public_html/wp-content/themes/THEME_NAME/ && echo '✓ Deploy complete'
scripts.zip: VERSION=$(node -p "require('./package.json').version") && cd .. && zip -r "wp-tailwind-starter-v$VERSION.zip" wp-tailwind-xserver/ -x 'wp-tailwind-xserver/node_modules/*' 'wp-tailwind-xserver/.git/*' 'wp-tailwind-xserver/src/*' 'wp-tailwind-xserver/package*.json' 'wp-tailwind-xserver/DESIGN.md' 'wp-tailwind-xserver/README.md' 'wp-tailwind-xserver/setup-deploy.sh' && echo "✓ wp-tailwind-starter-v$VERSION.zip"
